phases.description: Core SvelteKit site: routing, layout, CSS variables, all content types (blog, video, papers, photos, apps) wired up and deployed as a static site.
phases.label: PHASE 1
phases.name: Foundation

phases.description: Large content migration: H1 stripping from 571 markdown posts, featuredImage.render rollout, posts.json and galleries.json file renames, frontmatter cleanup across static content pages.
phases.label: PHASE 2
phases.name: Content Migration

phases.description: Comment moderation system via AWS Lambda + GitHub PRs, newsletter system with DynamoDB + SES, subscribe form, RSS feeds for blog and photos.
phases.label: PHASE 3
phases.name: Reader Engagement

phases.description: Ongoing improvements: accessibility, dark mode, performance, responsive design, SEO, and other quality-of-life enhancements.
phases.label: PHASE 4
phases.name: Site Polish

phases.description: Future enhancements: new interactive data visualization apps, search improvements, new content types, and reader-facing features.
phases.label: PHASE 5
phases.name: New Features
